item.title: Getting the Job Done in Heavy Recovery
item.description: A straightforward look at heavy recovery and roadside rescue work, showing the equipment and process used to get the job done. What part of recovery work stands out most to you?

media:content.media:title: Getting the Job Done in Heavy Recovery
media:content.media:description: A straightforward look at heavy recovery and roadside rescue work, showing the equipment and process used to get the job done. What part of recovery work stands out most to you?

item.title: Heavy Towing in Action
item.description: A look at heavy towing in action, showing the recovery process and the equipment used to move large vehicles safely. The operation highlights real-world roadside and field recovery work.

media:content.media:title: Heavy Towing in Action
media:content.media:description: A look at heavy towing in action, showing the recovery process and the equipment used to move large vehicles safely. The operation highlights real-world roadside and field recovery work.

item.title: Heavy Duty Truck Recovery
item.description: Powerful recovery equipment and skilled operators tackle a challenging towing operation from start to finish. What makes heavy towing different from a standard tow?

media:content.media:title: Heavy Duty Truck Recovery
media:content.media:description: Powerful recovery equipment and skilled operators tackle a challenging towing operation from start to finish. What makes heavy towing different from a standard tow?

item.title: Carrying a Heavy Load: Game of Inches (Part 1)
item.description: Transporting an enormous load requires careful planning and precise movements where every inch matters. What challenges lie ahead on this journey?

media:content.media:title: Carrying a Heavy Load: Game of Inches (Part 1)
media:content.media:description: Transporting an enormous load requires careful planning and precise movements where every inch matters. What challenges lie ahead on this journey?

item.title: No Job Too Big for Heavy Recovery
item.description: A demanding recovery showcases the capabilities of heavy-duty equipment and experienced operators. What kind of job pushes recovery crews to their limits?

media:content.media:title: No Job Too Big for Heavy Recovery
media:content.media:description: A demanding recovery showcases the capabilities of heavy-duty equipment and experienced operators. What kind of job pushes recovery crews to their limits?

item.title: This Was One Heavy Trailer
item.description: An oversized trailer presents unique towing and handling challenges due to its sheer weight. What does it take to move something this heavy safely?

media:content.media:title: This Was One Heavy Trailer
media:content.media:description: An oversized trailer presents unique towing and handling challenges due to its sheer weight. What does it take to move something this heavy safely?

item.title: Dozer Recovery Challenge on a Friday Night
item.description: A late-night recovery mission puts equipment, skill, and patience to the test as crews work to retrieve a stranded dozer. Can they get it done before the night is over?

media:content.media:title: Dozer Recovery Challenge on a Friday Night
media:content.media:description: A late-night recovery mission puts equipment, skill, and patience to the test as crews work to retrieve a stranded dozer. Can they get it done before the night is over?

item.title: Fixing a Failed Fifth Wheel on a Schneider Slider
item.description: A failed fifth wheel assembly on a Schneider slider requires inspection, repair, and troubleshooting to get the rig back in service. What caused the failure?

media:content.media:title: Fixing a Failed Fifth Wheel on a Schneider Slider
media:content.media:description: A failed fifth wheel assembly on a Schneider slider requires inspection, repair, and troubleshooting to get the rig back in service. What caused the failure?

item.title: Saving a Stranded Camper Trailer With Missing Rear
item.description: A damaged camper trailer faces a challenging recovery after losing part of its rear structure. How can it be moved safely?

media:content.media:title: Saving a Stranded Camper Trailer With Missing Rear
media:content.media:description: A damaged camper trailer faces a challenging recovery after losing part of its rear structure. How can it be moved safely?

item.title: This Recovery Required Extreme Precision
item.description: A high-risk recovery demands careful planning and exact movements to avoid further damage. What makes this job so delicate?

media:content.media:title: This Recovery Required Extreme Precision
media:content.media:description: A high-risk recovery demands careful planning and exact movements to avoid further damage. What makes this job so delicate?

item.title: Flatbed Driver Misjudges Turn, Recovery on Scene
item.description: A difficult turn leaves a flatbed in trouble, bringing recovery crews to the scene to resolve the situation. What went wrong during the maneuver?

media:content.media:title: Flatbed Driver Misjudges Turn, Recovery on Scene
media:content.media:description: A difficult turn leaves a flatbed in trouble, bringing recovery crews to the scene to resolve the situation. What went wrong during the maneuver?

item.title: Quick and Dirty Vehicle Recovery
item.description: A straightforward recovery operation focuses on getting a stranded vehicle back on the road as quickly as possible. Can the team make it look easy?

media:content.media:title: Quick and Dirty Vehicle Recovery
media:content.media:description: A straightforward recovery operation focuses on getting a stranded vehicle back on the road as quickly as possible. Can the team make it look easy?
